last_prompt: Implement a critic-actor reflection loop inspired by Openclaw and the Reflexion paper. After an actor agent completes a task and before committing, run a lightweight 'critic' prompt that reads the git diff and evaluates it against the original task description. The critic returns a structured CriticResult { score: f32, issues: Vec<String>, approved: bool }. If approved is false and there are substantive issues, re-invoke the actor with the issues as additional context (up to a configurable --reflection-rounds limit, default 2). Only after the critic approves (or rounds are exhausted) should tests run. Add 'critique_diff(diff: &str, task: &Task) -> Result<CriticResult>' and 'execute_task_with_reflection(task: &Task, rounds: u8) -> Result<()>' to AgentClient. Integrate into ralph_loop.rs. Add unit tests for the reflection round-counting logic.
